description_long: This is a modern, rectangular sink with a minimalist design, constructed from a solid, concrete-like material. The basin is wide and shallow, with sharply defined edges and a flat bottom, giving it a contemporary, industrial appearance. A single, sleek faucet is mounted at the rear center of the sink, positioned above the basin for easy access. The drain is subtly integrated into the rear section of the basin, maintaining the clean lines of the design. The surface finish appears matte, with a slightly rough texture typical of cast concrete. This sink is likely intended for wall-mounted installation in urban public spaces or modern commercial environments.
description: A rectangular, concrete-style sink with a wide, shallow basin, matte finish, and a single rear-mounted faucet.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the rectangular basin, the central faucet, and the clean, linear design.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the sink, the sloped basin, and the faucet's position at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back edge, faucet placement, and the overall thickness of the sink body.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, showing the sloped basin and rear faucet from the other side.
